question.label: Time pressure consistency
question.name: Under time pressure, what usually slips first in your work?
question.description: Drills into the specific failure mode behind his inconsistency so feedback can anchor on observable evidence.

answer: I sometimes focus on polish and lose sight of the core message.

assessment.note: He names a specific clarity failure mode: under pressure he optimizes polish over the core message.

new_queue.label: Core message miss
new_queue.name: When the core message gets lost, what are you not clear on in that moment?

new_queue.label: Feedback changed what
new_queue.name: What changed in your work after the last round of feedback?

new_queue.label: Work slowing you down
new_queue.name: What part of your growth feels most blocked right now?

new_queue.label: Next step agreement
new_queue.name: What should we agree you will do before we next meet?

history.answer_excerpt: I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
I sometimes focus on polish and lose sight of the core message.
